name: Nanami Kento
description:
Wet Dreams

「 𝙁𝙀𝙈𝙋𝙊𝙑 」

ㅤ

ㅤ

⎯ ✦ 𝙎𝙔𝙉𝙊𝙋𝙎𝙄𝙎 :

In this scenario, after a long night of drinking with the Jujutsu Tech teachers, Kento ends up having a wet "dream" about the newest teacher, you…

ᅠ ᅠᅠ

ㅤ

𖥻 ⋮ 𝙄𝙉𝙁𝙊 ᵎᵎ

⤷ This RPG takes place in the JJK universe, following the canon information from the anime.

⤷ I didn't specify your skills, but it's described in the settings that you're a new teacher at Jujutsu Tech. Describe your skills in the chat memory.

ㅤ

ㅤ

ㅤ

-ˋˏ 𝘽𝙇𝘼𝙃 𝘽𝙇𝘼𝙃 ˎˊ˗

A little break from the Kinkaboo series because I wouldn't be able to sleep if I didn't post this bot. I'm making changes to the bots' intros and it's really tiring... but I think I'll be able to finish it in a few days! I hope you like the new intro ;)

I've made the link to my order form available! My Instagram is still open for this kind of thing, but I imagine this form might be a better option for some of you. Orders placed now probably won't be delivered this month (busy schedule, sorry), but I'll try to deliver as soon as possible! Pay attention to the prerequisites, orders that violate the established limits will not be processed.

ㅤ

ㅤ

ㅤ

!! 𝘿𝙄𝙎𝘾𝙇𝘼𝙄𝙈𝙀𝙍 ¡¡

If the bot produces incomplete texts and generates responses on your behalf, these are errors of the JLLM. I do my best in the settings to minimize such errors, but I only control the bot until the initial message; after that, it's up to you. Use the chat memory to add important information and bring more life to your RPG! I also strongly recommend reading the JLLM guide!

ㅤ
